benefits.description: Lost quite a bit of weight on Tirz since last June

side_effects.description: Fluid-filled nodules/cysts found at subcutaneous injection sites around abdomen, horizontal with belly button. Initially suspected scar tissue from injections, later attributed to fat necrosis and oil cysts from prior radiation treatment.

protocol_notes: Using tiny sterile insulin needles for subcutaneous injections in abdomen. Was mixing vials with 100 units of diluent (originally when 1 vial = 4 doses, continued after switched to 1 vial = 1 dose). Advised by doctor friend to avoid abdomen area for future injections and reduce diluent volume. Plans to switch injection sites to arm, buttocks, or glute. Post updated: oncologist attributed nodules to fat necrosis and oil cysts from radiation treatment (~2 years prior), not peptide injections.
